$comment: Canonical project structure for the Bmg .NET hexagonal archetype. Consumed by the code generator (ArchetypeProfiler) to enforce full structural replication, in-place rename, and removal of unused sample projects. Human-readable mirror lives in archetype.md ('Manifesto de projetos e replicacao estrutural') and .github/copilot-instructions.md.

rename.rule: Rename every project folder, namespace, class, DI method and .csproj metadata from the token to Bmg.{App}.*. The output must contain EXACTLY ONE set of Bmg.{App}.* projects. NEVER leave a Bmg.ConsigBoilerplate.* folder, namespace or file beside the renamed one.

removal.rule: Remove sample/optional projects entirely when unused: delete the project folder, drop it from the .sln, remove its DI registration in Program.cs, remove the now-unused Domain port, and remove its matching Test project. Never ship an empty sample project.

projects.notes: Library. Instantiated exactly once. No *Dependency.cs, no Program.cs, no Properties/.
Library. Instantiated exactly once. Has DI module; no Program.cs, no Properties/.
Library. Instantiated exactly once. Has DI module; no Program.cs, no Properties/.
Executable entry point. Instantiated exactly once. ONLY project that has Program.cs and Properties/.

Sample external-integration adapter. Library: has .csproj + DI module, but NO Program.cs and NO Properties/. Remove the whole project (and its Test mirror, port and DI registration) when the service does not call that integration.
Each production project has a mirrored *.Test project. When a parent project is removed (e.g. a sample integration), remove its Test mirror too.
